title: Evolved Sculk Apocalypse
description: Fight the Sculk Horde and survive, and watch out for what lurks underwater...
body:
It's the end of the world - and you're the last line of defense. Can you push back the Sculk Horde and save the world? This modpack takes the Sculk Horde mod and gives you just enough to survive and harness the power of this squishy block, and you're going to need every bit of it. Gather some horns, craft some TNT, and cross your fingers - this corner of the multiverse just wants to add you to the collective...

## Check out my adventure against this Horde!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Fkj13MJCoSA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This modpack works entirely on it's own, but to download my specific map from the video, support me on Patreon!
**[https://patreon.com/Legundo](https://patreon.com/Legundo)**
